headline: Austin Filiere, CFA Joins Laffer Tengler Investments as Portfolio Manager
summary: SCOTTSDALE, Ariz., May 07, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Laffer Tengler Investments, Inc., a boutique investment management firm serving high-net-worth individuals, institutional clients, and platform advisors, is pleased to announce the addition of Austin Filiere as Portfolio Manager and a member of the Dividend Growth Strategy team. Filiere joins the firm from T. Rowe Price, a leading asset manager based in Baltimore, MD, where he spent five years working across private and technology investment te

headline: T. ROWE PRICE OHA SELECT PRIVATE CREDIT FUND ANNOUNCES MARCH 31, 2026 FINANCIAL RESULTS AND DECLARED TOTAL DISTRIBUTIONS OF $0.69 PER SHARE IN Q1 2026
summary: T. Rowe Price OHA Select Private Credit Fund (the "Company" or "OCREDIT") today reported financial results and total distributions of $0.69 per share for the quarter ended March 31, 2026.
